title: NickNamer+
description: This Plugin lets you Change your ingame-Name and Skin
body:
NickNamer+
  NickNamer+ lets players and staff set nicknames with full server visibility: chat, tab list, nametag, join/quit
  messages, death messages, and command targeting.

  Features

  - Set and clear nicknames
  - Optional skin source override
  - Nicknames shown in:
      - Chat
      - Tab list
      - Nametag
      - Join/quit messages
      - Death messages
  - Command rewrite support:
      - Target players by nickname in commands
  - GUI editor for easy nickname/skin management
  - Permission-based editing:
      - Players can edit themselves
      - Admins/operators can edit everyone
  - Compatible with rank display systems (refresh hook included)

  Commands

  - /nick <name|clear> - Set or clear your own nickname
  - /nametag gui - Open editor GUI
  - /nametag set <player> <nickname> - Set nickname
  - /nametag clear <player> - Clear nickname
  - /nametag skin <player> <skinName|clear> - Set/clear skin source
  - /nametag info <player> - Show stored nickname/skin info
  - /nametag reload - Reload plugin config/data

  Permissions

  - nametageditor.self - Self nickname usage
  - nametageditor.admin - Edit other players + admin commands

  Technical

  - Paper 1.21.x
  - Java 21
  - GUI + command workflow
  - No external dependencies required
